M1332_NUM_STAS_ULCR M1332 Current Number of (Observable) Stasis Ulcers This field indicates the current number of (observable) stasis wounds. 01 = One
02 = Two
03 = Three
04 = Four or more CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1334_STUS_PRBLM_STAS_ULCR M1334 Status of Most Problematic Stasis Ulcer This field indicates the status of the most problematic (observable) stasis ulcer. 01 = Fully granulating
02 = Early/partial granulation
03 = Not healing CHAR 2 x
